memoryArtifacts.headline: Sir Thomas de Felton KG (died 2 April 1381)
memoryArtifacts.description: Sir Thomas de Felton KG (died 2 April 1381) was an English knight. He fought at the Battle of Crécy in 1346, and the Capture of Calais in 1347. He was also at the Battle of Poitiers in 1356. A recurre …

zh.Mitford, Northumberland, England: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德米特福德
zh.Litcham, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可利其哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de Felton於大約1325年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德米特福德時，他的父親Sir John le Strange de Felton38歲，母親Sibyl37歲。他和Lady Joan Walkfare至少有3個女兒。他於1381年被列為knight of the garter 。他去世於1381年4月25日在英國諾福爾可享年57歲。

zh-hans.Litcham, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可利其哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de Felton于大约1325年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德米特福德时，他的父亲Sir John le Strange de Felton38岁，母亲Sibyl37岁。他和Lady Joan Walkfare至少有3个女儿。他于1381年被列为knight of the garter 。他去世于1381年4月25日在英国諾福爾可享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Felton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places so called. Most of them, including those in Herefordshire, Shropshire, and Somerset (Winford), are named from Old English feld ‘pasture, open country’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. Another place of the same name in Somerset, also known as Whitchurch, has as its first element Old English filethe ‘hay’. Felton Hill in Northumberland is named with the Old English personal name Fygla (a derivative of fugol ‘bird’; compare Fowle ).

variants.name: Fowle
meanings: English (Kent): patronymic from the Middle English personal name Foghel, Fughel (Old English Fugel, Fugol, from Old English fugol ‘fowl, bird’). Alternatively, a nickname from Middle English fughel, foghel, foul ‘fowl, bird’, either with reference to physical appearance, size, or behavior, or possibly also a nickname for someone who kept or sold birds.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de Felton was born about 1325, in Mitford, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John le Strange de Felton, was 38 and his mother, Sibyl, was 37. He had at least 3 daughters with Lady Joan Walkfare. In 1381, at the age of 57, his occupation is listed as knight of the garter . He died on 25 April 1381, in Norfolk, England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de Felton est né environ 1325, à Mitford, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John le Strange de Felton, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Sibyl, avait 37 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 filles avec Lady Joan Walkfare. En 1381, à l’âge de 57 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est knight of the garter . Il est décédé le 25 avril 1381, à Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas de Felton um 1325 in Mitford, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John le Strange de Felton 38 und seine Mutter Sibyl 37. Er hatte mit Lady Joan Walkfare mindestens 3 Töchter. 1381, als er 57 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als knight of the garter  aufgeführt. Er starb am 25. April 1381 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Felton è nato il circa 1325 nel Mitford, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John le Strange de Felton, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Sibyl, aveva 37 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figlie con Lady Joan Walkfare. Nel 1381, all'età di 57 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come knight of the garter . Morì il 25 aprile 1381, nel Norfolk, England, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Feltonが約1325年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドミトフォードで生まれた時，父Sir John le Strange de Feltonは38歳，母Sibylは37歳であった。彼はLady Joan Walkfareとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。1381年，57歳の時，職業はknight of the garter と記録されている。彼は1381年4月25日にイギリスノーフォルクで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Felton(이)가 대략 1325년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 미트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John le Strange de Felton(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibyl(은)는 37세였다. 그는 Lady Joan Walkfare(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1381년, 57세의 나이로 그의 직업은 knight of the garter 이었다. 그는 1381년 4월 25일 영국 노르폴크에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Felton nasceu aproximadamente 1325, em Mitford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John le Strange de Felton, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Sibyl, tinha 37 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhas com Lady Joan Walkfare. Em 1381, com 57 anos, sua profissão aparece como knight of the garter . Ele faleceu em 25 de abril de 1381, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de Felton родился около 1325 г. в местности митфорд, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John le Strange de Felton было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibyl, 37. У него было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Lady Joan Walkfare. В 1381 году, в возрасте 57 лет,  он работал по профессии knight of the garter . Он умер 25 апреля 1381 г. в местности норфолк, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas de Felton nació aproximadamente 1325, en Mitford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John le Strange de Felton, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Sibyl, tenía 37 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con Lady Joan Walkfare. En 1381, a la edad de 57 años, su ocupación registrada era knight of the garter . Murió el 25 de abril de 1381, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años.
